# Experience Concierge v39

The Experience Concierge is the website completion layer for GoalOS AGIJobManager Ascension. It gives non-technical users and advanced users a single, friendly, browser-local guide for choosing the correct proof demonstration, evidence room, legal/token boundary, or expert surface.

It preserves every existing route and adds a cleaner navigation shell, global Site Command, guided journeys, and fallback rehydration for missing public pages.

Public-safe posture: no account, no form submission, no analytics, no cookies, no storage, no wallet connection, no transaction broadcast, no production authority, and no user data wanted.
